descriptions.li: I drank naphtha. The burn makes me want to bark orders and push through the taste.
I drank naphtha. I hate the taste, but I can endure it quietly.
I drank naphtha. I should warn the others before someone else tries this.
I drank naphtha. I will handle the aftertaste alone and keep moving.
I drank naphtha. I do not want a scene, but the oily smell will not leave my mouth.
I drank naphtha. I just need to sit still until the taste fades.
I drank naphtha. Someone should check the stores so nobody repeats my mistake.
I drank naphtha. I will stay out of the way until my stomach settles.
I drank naphtha. If we are going to rely on this, we need a better shared plan.
I drank naphtha. I can tolerate it if the colony needs me to, but not gladly.
I drank naphtha. The group should know exactly how foul this stuff is.
I drank naphtha. I will take my share, but nobody should pretend it is pleasant.
I drank naphtha. Fine. I know what my body needs, even when it tastes like a refinery.
I drank naphtha. I will keep the discomfort to myself.
I drank naphtha. I hope the others appreciate what this body demands.
I drank naphtha. The oily burn is mine to manage.

li.label: oil smell in my mouth
li.description: I drank naphtha. The oily smell will not leave my mouth.

descriptions.li: I drank raw BTX compounds. The burn feels like command returning to my blood.
I drank raw BTX compounds. Quiet relief spreads under the oily taste.
I drank raw BTX compounds. I feel steady enough to stand with the others again.
I drank raw BTX compounds. My body knows its own medicine.
I drank raw BTX compounds. I will not make a fuss, but I needed that.
I drank raw BTX compounds. The warmth settles me into silence.
I drank raw BTX compounds. We should keep enough for everyone who needs it.
I drank raw BTX compounds. I feel better away from all the noise.
I drank raw BTX compounds. Good. Now I can help keep everyone on their feet.
I drank raw BTX compounds. It is harsh, but I can bear it for the colony.
I drank raw BTX compounds. The relief feels better when nobody is left short.
I drank raw BTX compounds. I know my ration, and I know my limit.
I drank raw BTX compounds. Exactly what I needed. Nobody has to approve.
I drank raw BTX compounds. The relief is private and clean.
I drank raw BTX compounds. I can rejoin the line now.
I drank raw BTX compounds. My chemistry is mine again.

li.label: enjoyed raw BTX
li.description: I drank raw BTX compounds. The oily burn was exactly what I wanted.
